name: plastron-simple-os-example
description: plastron-OS — a single index.html that boots to a desktop of app icons (Sheets, Notepad, Doom); clicking one launches it, exit returns home. Built on app-host + the view layer; no new kernel work.

scripts.test: bun test desktop.test.ts && bun test sheets.test.ts && bun test browser-main.test.ts && bun test file-explorer.test.ts && bun test file-picker.test.ts && bun test doom-app.test.ts
scripts.check: bun build index.html --target=browser --outdir /tmp/os-check --external pyodide --external quickjs-emscripten --external wabt --external node:fs/promises --external node:path
